response.step_by_step_log: Identified the event hashtag #3DKobornDay2025 from the video. The video contains a performance segment from 00:03 to 03:32. I attempted to search for the lyrics 'Saa koe o agete ayumi hajime nakya' to identify the song, but the search results did not provide a definitive match for this specific cover performance. Therefore, the song title is marked as 'Unidentified Vocal Track', and the lyric fields are set to null. The rest of the video is identified as dialogue (MC) and a promotional outro.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual stage performance segment by Kobo Kanaeru as part of her 3D Birthday 2025 concert, followed by an MC/talk segment and a promotional outro banner.

scenes.description: Introductory shot of the virtual concert stage before the performance begins.
Kobo Kanaeru performs a song on the virtual stage, surrounded by animated star and cloud effects.
Kobo Kanaeru speaks to the audience, discusses the stage, mentions 'closing', and asks for screenshots.
Promotional still image banner displaying merchandise for 'Kobo Kanaeru Birthday 2025'.
